      "cell_type": "code",

      "metadata": {
        "id": "Mb5LaFamqiY_",
        "colab": {

        },
        "outputId": "da496300-7b1b-43b9-88dd-3319a32df344"
      },
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "epoch: 0 loss: 0.5898767709732056 val_loss: 0.554969072341919\n",
            "epoch: 20 loss: 0.05640473589301109 val_loss: 0.026213087141513824\n",
            "early stopping at epoch: 34\n",
            "best model is at epoch: 14 with validation loss: 0.015422518365085125\n"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import torch\n",
        "import torch.nn as nn\n",
        "import torch.optim as optim\n",
        "from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, TensorDataset\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "fs=32\n",
        "N=128\n",
        "t=np.arange(N)/fs\n",
        "\n",
        "signals=np.zeros((5000,128))\n",
        "noises=np.zeros((5000,128))\n",
        "\n",
        "for i in range(5000):\n",
        "  f_rand=np.random.uniform(2,16,1)\n",
        "  phi=np.random.uniform(0,2*np.pi,1)\n",
        "  noise_sample=np.random.normal(0,0.4,128)\n",
        "  signals[i]=1.0*np.sin(2*np.pi*f_rand*t+phi)+noise_sample\n",
        "  noises[i]=np.random.normal(0,0.4,128)\n",
        "\n",
        "x=np.concatenate([signals,noises],axis=0)\n",
        "y=np.concatenate([np.ones(5000),np.zeros(5000)],axis=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "indices=np.random.permutation(10000)\n",
        "x=x[indices]\n",
        "y=y[indices]\n",
        "\n",
        "class Net(nn.Module):\n",
        "  def __init__(self):\n",
        "    super(Net,self).__init__()\n",
        "    self.input=nn.Linear(128,32)\n",
        "    self.h1=nn.Linear(32,32)\n",
        "    self.h2=nn.Linear(32,32)\n",
        "    self.output=nn.Linear(32,1)\n",
        "    self.drop=nn.Dropout(0.3)\n",
        "\n",
        "  def forward(self,x):\n",
        "    x=torch.relu(self.input(x))\n",
        "    x=self.drop(x)\n",
        "    x=torch.relu(self.h1(x))\n",
        "    x=self.drop(x)\n",
        "    x=torch.relu(self.h2(x))\n",
        "    x=self.drop(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "    return self.output(x)\n",
        "\n",
        "model=Net()\n",
        "criterion=nn.BCEWithLogitsLoss()\n",
        "optimizer=optim.Adam(model.parameters(),lr=0.001)\n",
        "\n",
        "split=int(0.8*(x.shape[0]))\n",
        "x_train,x_val=x[:split],x[split:]\n",
        "y_train,y_val=y[:split],y[split:]\n",
        "\n",
        "x_train=torch.tensor(x_train,dtype=torch.float32)\n",
        "y_train=torch.tensor(y_train,dtype=torch.float32).unsqueeze(1)\n",
        "x_val=torch.tensor(x_val,dtype=torch.float32)\n",
        "y_val=torch.tensor(y_val,dtype=torch.float32).unsqueeze(1)\n",
        "\n",
        "dataset=TensorDataset(x_train,y_train)\n",
        "dataloader=DataLoader(dataset,batch_size=128,shuffle=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "train_losses=[]\n",
        "val_losses=[]\n",
        "best_epoch=0\n",
        "\n",
        "patience = 20\n",
        "patience_counter = 0\n",
        "best_val_loss = float('inf')\n",
        "\n",
        "for epoch in range(200):\n",
        "  model.train()\n",
        "  epoch_loss=0\n",
        "\n",
        "  for batch_x,batch_y in dataloader:\n",
        "    optimizer.zero_grad()\n",
        "    pred=model(batch_x)\n",
        "    loss=criterion(pred,batch_y)\n",
        "    loss.backward()\n",
        "    torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(),max_norm=1.0)\n",
        "    optimizer.step()\n",
        "    epoch_loss+=loss.item()\n",
        "\n",
        "  avg_train_loss=epoch_loss/len(dataloader)\n",
        "  train_losses.append(avg_train_loss)\n",
        "\n",
        "  model.eval()\n",
        "  with torch.no_grad():\n",
        "    val_pred=model(x_val)\n",
        "    val_loss=criterion(val_pred,y_val)\n",
        "    pred_class=(val_pred>0.5).float()\n",
        "    accuracy=(pred_class==y_val).float().mean()\n",
        "    val_losses.append(val_loss.item())\n",
        "\n",
        "  if val_loss < best_val_loss:\n",
        "    best_val_loss = val_loss\n",
        "    patience_counter = 0\n",
        "    torch.save(model.state_dict(), 'best_model.pth')\n",
        "    best_epoch=epoch\n",
        "  else:\n",
        "    patience_counter += 1\n",
        "    if patience_counter >= patience:\n",
        "        print('early stopping at epoch:', epoch)\n",
        "        break\n",
        "\n",
        "  if epoch%20==0:\n",
        "    print('epoch:',epoch,'loss:',loss.item(),'val_loss:',val_loss.item())\n",
        "\n",
        "model.load_state_dict(torch.load('best_model.pth'))\n",
        "print('best model is at epoch:', best_epoch,'with validation loss:', best_val_loss.item())"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.plot(train_losses,label='train_loss')\n",
        "plt.plot(val_losses,label='val_loss')\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "TP = ((pred_class == 1) & (y_val == 1)).sum().item()\n",
        "FP = ((pred_class==1) & (y_val==0)).sum().item()\n",
        "TN=((pred_class == 0) & (y_val == 0)).sum().item()\n",
        "FN = ((pred_class == 0) & (y_val == 1)).sum().item()\n",
        "\n",
        "print(TP,FP,TN,FN)"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "cm=np.array([[TP,FN],[FP,TN]])\n",
        "plt.imshow(cm,cmap='Blues')\n",
        "plt.colorbar()\n",
        "plt.xticks([0, 1], ['Predicted Signal', 'Predicted Noise'])\n",
